data.title: Estée Lauder appoints a chief digital and marketing officer
data.description: The appointment reflects Estée Lauder’s strategic focus on strengthening its consumer-centric marketing and enhancing its digital presence across its portfolio of prestige beauty brands.

data.title: Tata Chemicals adopts an AI platform to tighten procurement controls
data.description: Key features of the system include AI-based spend classification, automated audit checks, and predictive insights aimed at optimizing vendor management and purchasing patterns.

data.title: ColdTrack launches 100% pack accuracy guarantee for perishable ecommerce fulfillment
data.description: The New Jersey-based fulfillment provider announced a new 100% pack accuracy guarantee for its clients, promising to reimburse customers for any order errors originating from its facilities.

data.title: Albertsons digital sales grow at 10x rate of total sales in Q1
data.description: Ecommerce accounted for 9% of Albertsons' total grocery revenue in Q1, with CEO Susan Morris attributing growth to first-party sales, or those through Albertsons' own websites and apps.

data.title: Ahold Delhaize to welcome new CTO in September
data.description: Jan Brecht will replace Ben Wishart at CTO at Ahold Delhaize, officially taking on the executive role in September.
